dodgePhaseConfig.title: Tail Swing!
dodgePhaseConfig.description: The tail sweeps across the arena in a wide column. Move left or right to dodge!

dodgePhaseConfig.title: Fire Sweep!
dodgePhaseConfig.description: Flames sweep across two rows — get clear.

dodgePhaseConfig.title: Dive Slash!
dodgePhaseConfig.description: A diagonal fire strike cuts across the arena.

dodgePhaseConfig.title: Scatter Flames!
dodgePhaseConfig.description: Fire rains down on random tiles.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A vicious bite for 125% damage that can cause Bleeding.

abilities.name: Lunge
abilities.description: After a short wind-up, the boar lunges for 150% physical damage.

abilities.name: Forest Renewal
abilities.description: Calls on living roots to regenerate health over time.

abilities.name: Web Snare
abilities.description: Spits binding webbing that freezes the player's auto-attack for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Silken Recovery
abilities.description: Wraps itself in restorative silk, regenerating health over time.

abilities.name: Poison Spit
abilities.description: Launches a glob of venom that deals poison damage and may apply Poison.

abilities.name: Mauling Blow
abilities.description: A crushing swipe for 120% physical damage that stuns for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Mending Hide
abilities.description: Below 40% HP, the troll's hide knits itself back together, restoring 25% max HP over 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Weapon Throw
abilities.description: One-time 3 second cast. Throws its weapon for 200% weapon damage with +20% critical chance, then fights at 60% damage for the rest of combat.

abilities.name: Crushing Blow
abilities.description: 2 second cast. Deals 100% weapon damage and stuns the player for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Savage Roar
abilities.description: Short cast. Staggers the player and reduces their damage for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Bone Haste
abilities.description: Instant. The next 3 auto attacks are 50% faster.

abilities.name: Grave Chill
abilities.description: Cast a spectral chill that staggers the enemy for the next 2 auto attacks.

abilities.name: Shadow Bolt
abilities.description: Cast a slow bolt of shadow energy that deals spell damage.

abilities.name: Oathbreaker Riposte
abilities.description: After blocking an attack, the Black Knight answers with a cursed shield riposte that pierces armor and staggers the player.

abilities.name: Grave Cleave
abilities.description: A slow cursed cleave for 140% weapon damage with bonus critical chance and armor penetration.

abilities.name: Black Banner
abilities.description: At low health, summons a destructible banner with 50 HP. While it stands, the Black Knight gains block chance and damage.

blue.logText: Blue oath-light fractures. The pillar is exposed.
Blue oath-light fractures. The pillar is exposed.

abilities.name: Shield Bash
abilities.description: After blocking an attack, the squire retaliates with a shield strike that stuns the player for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Dark Bolt
abilities.description: A quick shadow bolt cast from the tower's old ritual marks.

abilities.name: Greater Dark Bolt
abilities.description: A rare once-per-combat shadow cast with a long wind-up that deals 200% spell damage.

abilities.name: Shadow Bolt
abilities.description: A 2 second shadow cast that deals light magic damage.

abilities.name: Arcane Bolt
abilities.description: A short arcane bolt that deals light magic damage.

abilities.name: Binding Flash
abilities.description: A rare binding flash that stuns the player for 1 second.

abilities.name: Seismic Slam
abilities.description: A heavy 2.5 second slam for 120% weapon damage that stuns and staggers the player.

abilities.name: Stoneguard
abilities.description: Recovers Block Power and gains block chance for the next 3 incoming auto attacks.

abilities.name: Ember Spit
abilities.description: A quick fire spell with a chance to burn the player.

abilities.name: Searing Bite
abilities.description: A short bite that deals reduced weapon damage and applies a brief burn.

abilities.name: Infernal Rend
abilities.description: A ripping physical strike that applies fire burn.

abilities.name: Abyssal Pulse
abilities.description: At 25% HP, braces with abyssal energy and takes 50% less damage for the next 2 incoming auto attacks.

abilities.name: Web Snare
abilities.description: Spits binding webbing that freezes the player's auto-attack for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Brood Call
abilities.description: Calls two Cave Spiderlings from the nest walls.

abilities.name: Silken Recovery
abilities.description: Wraps herself in restorative silk, regenerating health over time.

abilities.name: Crossbow Shot
abilities.description: A heavy bolt loosed at full draw — 165% weapon damage.

abilities.name: Rune Strike
abilities.description: Channels runic power into a heavy swing for 130% weapon damage.

abilities.name: Pack Command
abilities.description: Barks orders to all living allies, boosting their damage by 25% for 3 attacks.

abilities.name: Tail Spike
abilities.description: A rapid tail strike for 120% damage that can cause Bleeding.

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.description: Leaps onto the target for 135% damage and stuns briefly.

abilities.name: Runic Zap
abilities.description: A quick discharge of runic energy that arcs toward the target.

abilities.name: Rune Pulse
abilities.description: Discharges stored runic energy in a concentrated pulse of arcane force.

abilities.name: Runic Overload
abilities.description: Channels all stored runic energy into a devastating arcane blast.

abilities.name: Volatile Strike
abilities.description: A rune-charged swing for 120% damage that randomly triggers elemental burn.

abilities.name: Rune Burst
abilities.description: Releases built-up runic energy in a short-range burst of arcane force.

abilities.name: Oath Cleave
abilities.description: A powerful two-handed cleave for 130% damage that briefly stuns.

abilities.name: Honor Oath
abilities.description: At low health, channels an ancestral oath — gains counter chance for the rest of the fight.

abilities.name: Hammer Slam
abilities.description: A thunderous overhead slam for 140% weapon damage that stuns and staggers.

abilities.name: Iron Wall
abilities.description: At 40% HP, Bolgrak plants his feet — block chance surges and he retaliates blocked hits.

abilities.name: Healing Rune
abilities.description: When first bloodied below 70%, runic armor activates — heals 30% max HP over 3 attacks.

abilities.name: Runed Strike
abilities.description: A heavy rune-charged melee strike for 135% weapon damage.

abilities.name: Runic Discharge
abilities.description: Discharges built-up runic energy — deals arcane damage and staggers.

abilities.name: Runic Mending
abilities.description: Channels a repair rune — restores 20% max HP over 4 ticks. Pressure him or he recovers.

abilities.name: Rune Surge
abilities.description: At 50% HP, the Branded One overloads his runes — attack speed and spell power surge.

abilities.name: Hammer Slam
abilities.description: A thunderous ancestral hammer blow for 130% damage that stuns briefly.

abilities.name: Iron Bulwark
abilities.description: Raises the ancestral shield — block chance surges for the next 4 incoming hits.

abilities.name: Ancestral Roar
abilities.description: A soul-shaking roar from the ancient bloodline — weakens and staggers the hero.

abilities.name: Loose the Beast
abilities.description: At half health, Durnek breaks the chains — Kharvox enters the fight.

abilities.name: Ancestral Wrath
abilities.description: Phase 2: A furious overhead smash for 180% damage with bonus critical chance.

abilities.name: Healing Seal
abilities.description: Channels a rune seal — regenerates 8% max HP per tick until interrupted by a direct hit.

abilities.name: Rune Shackle
abilities.description: Fires a runic projectile for 150% spell damage that staggers the hero for 2 attacks.

abilities.name: Chimeric Surge
abilities.description: At 60% HP, surges with feral energy — heals 15% max HP over 4 ticks.

abilities.name: Volatile Brand
abilities.description: At 30% HP, unleashes a desperate brand attack for 160% damage that burns the target.
